notes: SHIP v1.14.204 — web-Claude (external build line) FIX PASS, adopted onto my .203 (files49: full dct-ios.html + v1.14.204.diff). PROVENANCE VERIFIED: their file = my .203 dct-ios.html + the provided diff EXACTLY (full normalized diff matched the .diff hunk-for-hunk, 43 lines / 11 hunks, nothing smuggled); adopted CRLF-PRESERVED (their file was LF — converted LF->CRLF, re-audited uniform CRLF bareLF=0, re-diffed vs committed .203 = same 11 hunks). Their zip omitted sw.js/version.json — three-stamp lockstep done here. FIXES (owner device-confirmed per diff comments): (1) #omni-bar opaque plate — card text was ghosting through the capture/nav band. (2) .ask DOUBLE-RULE: my two body.rd .ask rules meant the later G-1 rule won the cascade and every material edit in the 8844 layout rule was a silent NO-OP; 8844 stripped to layout-only, all material consolidated into the G-1 rule. (3) .ask BORDER-BOX INVISIBILITY (the big one): the border-box gradient-ring trick does NOT paint on a raw <button> on iOS even with -webkit-appearance:none (owner confirmed twice) — so MY ask-card glass (.191 owner-ruled surface + .195 saturation) never rendered on device. Replaced with the pre-G-1 primitive (1px ring + padding-box glass + inset glow, consumes --glow-border per one-knob law); appearance reset added. (4) T3 primary-button tune: outer bloom + bottom drop shadow deleted (asymmetric bloom read as row tilt), inner glow fixed 12%. (5) D-1 STAT-FACE ROOT FIX: my D-1a/.201 + D-1b/.203 faces crushed .card-title to a sliver because .card-hdr lacked flex-wrap and .card-stat/.card-tags lacked flex-basis:100% — the stat row competed in the header flex row instead of wrapping below it; fixed w/ card-hdr flex-wrap + ico-tile/card-right flex-shrink:0 + full-basis stat/tags. NET: .204 corrects on-device render bugs in my .191/.195/.198/.201/.203 glass+faces work. NOTE (not acted on — no while-here edits): pt-btn-primary is also a raw <button> with a border-box background the diff did NOT strip; if it shows the same invisibility that is a future device-verify finding, out of .204 scope.
